query: SELECT t.id, t.userId, u.username, t.type, t.amount, t.description, t.createdAt FROM transactions t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.userId WHERE t.type IN ('daily_billing', 'nas_billing', 'billing', 'debit') ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 38MgGCfAkTTcdrf.ae1ad98e5b22 --database JYruXSQahvP3cr6rPdjNhA --execute SELECT t.id, t.userId, u.username, t.type, t.amount, t.description, t.createdAt FROM transactions t JOIN users u ON u.id = t.userId WHERE t.type IN ('daily_billing', 'nas_billing', 'billing', 'debit') ORDER BY t.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
